sn26.8:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the arising, continuation, production, and manifestation of craving for forms … of craving for mental phenomena is the arising of suffering, the continuation of disease, the manifestation of aging-and-death.sn.iii.231
sn26.8:1.2: "The cessation, subsiding, and passing away of craving for forms … of craving for mental phenomena is the cessation of suffering, the subsiding of disease, the passing away of aging-and-death."
